name: AI Patient Follow-Up System: Auto-Send Welcome, Rebook and Follow-Up Emails with Claude

parameters.content:
## AI Patient Follow-Up System using Claude and Gmail

Stop manually chasing patients. This workflow reads every new patient intake submission, uses Claude AI to understand their situation, and automatically sends the right email -- a warm welcome for new patients, a re-booking nudge for lapsed ones, or a personalised follow-up for everyone else. High-priority re-booking cases also alert your clinic manager on Slack.

### How it works

1. A patient submits your intake form built into this workflow -- collecting their name, email, contact reason, appointment status, and any notes.
2. Claude Sonnet reads the submission and decides the best action: send a welcome email, prompt them to re-book, or send a follow-up.
3. Claude also writes the full personalised email body and subject line tailored to that patient.
4. A Switch node routes the patient to the correct branch based on Claude's decision.
5. New patients get a warm welcome email sent automatically via Gmail.
6. Lapsed patients get a re-booking email, and your clinic manager gets a Slack alert to confirm the appointment.
7. All other patients get a personalised follow-up email.
8. Every patient communication is logged to Google Sheets with timestamp, action taken, and Claude's reasoning.

### Setup steps

- [ ] **Form link** -- Activate the workflow to generate your patient intake form URL. Share it on your website, in email signatures, or via SMS. No external form tool needed.
- [ ] **Configure Settings node** -- Open Configure Clinic Settings and fill in your clinic name, Gmail sender address, Slack channel ID, booking link, and Google Sheets IDs.
- [ ] **Gmail** -- Connect your Gmail account in Send Welcome Email, Send Rebook Email, and Send Follow-Up Email nodes.
- [ ] **Claude AI** -- Click the Claude Sonnet sub-node under Analyse Patient Submission, add a new Anthropic credential, and paste your API key from console.anthropic.com.
- [ ] **Slack** -- Connect your Slack account in Notify Clinic Manager and set your channel. Right-click and Disable this node if you do not use Slack.
- [ ] **Google Sheets** -- Create a sheet called Communications Log with columns: Timestamp, Patient Name, Patient Email, Action, Urgency, Email Subject, Reason, Status. Connect your Google account in all three Log nodes.
- [ ] **Customise Claude prompt** -- Open Build Patient Prompt and update the clinic description to match your practice type (dental, GP, physio, etc.).
- [ ] Activate the workflow and submit a test form entry to verify all three branches work.

### Customization

Add a fourth branch for urgent cases by adding a new output to the Switch node and checking the urgency field. Connect a phone-call trigger via Twilio for high-urgency patients. Swap the Form Trigger for a Google Sheets Trigger if you already collect intake data in a spreadsheet.

## Capture patient intake

A built-in n8n form collects patient name, email, contact reason, appointment status, and notes. No third-party form tool needed -- the URL is generated automatically when the workflow is activated.

## Analyse and write email with Claude AI

Claude Sonnet reads the patient record and returns one structured decision: which action to take (welcome, rebook, or follow-up), the urgency level, a personalised email subject, a full plain-text email body, and a one-sentence reasoning.

Edit the prompt in Build Patient Prompt to describe your clinic type and any additional context you want Claude to consider.

## Route by action

A Switch node reads Claude's decision and routes each patient to one of three branches: Welcome (new patients), Rebook (lapsed patients), or Follow-Up (all others).

## Send email and log every communication

Each branch sends a Claude-written plain-text email via Gmail and logs the result to Google Sheets.

The Rebook branch also sends a Slack alert to your clinic manager so they can personally confirm a new appointment time with the patient.

Slack is optional -- right-click Notify Clinic Manager and Disable if unused.

values.option: Never been -- I am a new patient

parameters.formDescription: Please fill in your details and we will be in touch shortly.

parameters.jsCode:
var d = $input.first().json;

var prompt = 'You are a patient communication assistant for a clinic called ' + d.clinic_name + '. ' +
  'Read the patient record below and decide the best action to take. ' +
  'Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object -- no other text, no markdown, no explanation.\n\n' +
  'PATIENT RECORD:\n' +
  'Name: ' + d.patient_name + '\n' +
  'Email: ' + d.patient_email + '\n' +
  'Reason for contact: ' + d.contact_reason + '\n' +
  'Last visit: ' + d.last_visit + '\n' +
  'Additional notes: ' + d.notes + '\n\n' +
  'BOOKING LINK: ' + d.booking_link + '\n\n' +
  'ACTION GUIDE:\n' +
  'send_welcome -- Patient is new or has never visited before\n' +
  'rebook_appointment -- Patient missed an appointment or has not visited in over 6 months\n' +
  'send_followup -- Patient had a recent visit or has a general question\n\n' +
  'RETURN THIS EXACT JSON STRUCTURE:\n' +
  '{"action":"send_welcome","urgency":"normal","email_subject":"plain text subject, no emojis","email_body":"full plain text email body, warm and professional, include the booking link if relevant, no HTML","reason":"one sentence explaining why you chose this action"}\n\n' +
  'urgency must be high or normal. high means the patient needs to be seen urgently.';

return [{ json: Object.assign({}, d, { prompt: prompt }) }];
